title: eriocaulon wightianum var. helferi
intro: Eriocaulon wightianum var. helferi, also known as Helfer's pipe sedge, is a type of flowering plant in the Eriocaulaceae family. This plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Eriocaulon wightianum var. helferi include reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and exhibiting antifungal and antibacterial properties. The herbal preparations of this plant include infusions and decoctions, which are often used in traditional Ayurvedic medicine to treat various health conditions.
